name: Tex-Mex Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vegetables in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the olive oil, red wine vinegar, minced garlic, chopped parsley, chili powder, and salt and pepper to taste.
3. Pour the dressing over the vegetable mixture.
4. Stir in the cooked pasta, then sprinkle with the cubed Jack cheese and sunflower seeds.
5. Toss gently to combine all ingredients.
6. Chill until ready to serve.
